name: Calendar View
description: Display entities in a filterable calendar View
notes: Provides two Views style plugins, `calendar_month` (Calendar by month) and `calendar_week` (Calendar by week), that render a View's results as an HTML table calendar. The style needs at least one supported Date field placed in the View's fields, selected via the style option `calendar_fields`. Supported date field types (CalendarViewBase::DATE_FIELD_TYPES): date, created, changed, datetime, daterange, smartdate, timestamp. Also ships matching pager plugins (`calendar_month`/`calendar_week`, previous/next month or week navigation) and a `calendar_view_timestamp` Views filter (a 'Jump to' date exposed filter). No admin settings form of its own (configure is null) -- everything is configured per-View in the Views UI. Submodule calendar_view_multiday improves rendering of multi-day events; calendar_view_demo ships example Views (not documented here).
